summary: Iteration 139: Comprehensive UI regression testing for 5 pages after Foodics-inspired UI overhaul. All pages (Employees, My Portal, Sales, Expenses, Suppliers) render correctly and are fully functional. No functional regressions found.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <tr>/<span> nesting in console - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Employees page: Summary cards (Total, Active, Left/Terminated, Monthly Payroll, Show All) working correctly as clickable filters
Employees page: Action buttons (View, Pay, Leave, Exit, Delete) all functional with proper dialogs
Employees page: Branch filter pills at top correctly filter employee list
My Portal page: Shows 'Employee Profile Not Linked' for admin user (expected behavior)
My Portal page: Notifications section displaying 3 task notifications correctly
Sales page: Branch summary cards at top showing branch-wise monthly sales breakdown
Sales page: Date filter buttons (All, Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Custom Range) all working
Sales page: Daily grouped table with expandable rows showing sale details
Sales page: Add Sale form with Branch Sale / Online Sale tabs properly structured
Expenses page: Branch expense summary at top with cash/bank breakdown per branch
Expenses page: Tabs for Add Expense / All Expenses / Recurring all working
Expenses page: Category pill buttons (Salary, Rent, Utilities, etc.) for expense categorization
Expenses page: Expandable daily grouped table similar to Sales page
Suppliers page: Card layout with Total Purchases and Credit Status for each supplier
Suppliers page: Action buttons (Bill, Pay, Ledger) all working with proper dialogs
Suppliers page: Ledger dialog shows complete transaction history with balance tracking
Sidebar: Foodics-inspired design with light gray background and orange active states confirmed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 139: UI regression testing after Foodics-inspired design overhaul complete. All 5 pages (Employees, My Portal, Sales, Expenses, Suppliers) working correctly. Sidebar has light gray background with orange active states. Pages use card-based layouts with rounded corners. Date filters and expandable table rows are consistent patterns across Sales and Expenses pages. Minor React hydration warning in console for EmployeesPage table but no functional impact.
